posts.author: Bobby.Trick (Bobby Trick)
posts.cookedHtml:
I like to mute board notifications when building out a large timeline. I do this specifically to not blow up everybody’s inbox with notifications for every small change in dates, names, and whatnot. I usually follow up a big change like this with a general update to everyone about the new projected timeline.

The problem… sometimes i forget to turn notifications back on. Can an option be added to the “mute Notifications on this Board” dialogue to last for an hour? two hours? until the end of the day?
